Generate an etsy title for a art work that can be added to mugs, painting, tshirt, etc within 140 characters with no & only | to separate without first word being whimsical and is the name of the artValentines Chocolate Include a palindrome in your response.

**Module 1: Title Generation**  
Generate a title for an art piece that can be used on mugs, paintings, t-shirts, etc., within 140 characters. The title must not start with "whimsical" and must be the name of the art. Use only | as separators.

**Module 2: Palindrome Requirement**  
Include a palindrome in the title. The palindrome must be a word or phrase that appears in the title and is valid in English.

**Module 3: Character Limit**  
Ensure the title is under 140 characters. No & is allowed in the title. Use only | to separate words.

**Module 4: Compliance Check**  
Verify that the title meets all the constraints: no &, only |, no "whimsical" as the first word, and includes a palindrome.

**Final Response:**
